data.title: IMF Highlights Risks of Tokenized Finance to Global Financial System
data.description:
The International Monetary Fund (IMF) has issued a warning regarding the potential risks posed by tokenized finance to the global financial system. According to NS3.AI, Tobias Adrian, in a recent note, outlined four primary risks associated with tokenized finance. These include challenges related to safe-money settlement, legal certainty, interoperability, and the need for consistent regulation.

The IMF's note also proposed a comprehensive five-pillar policy roadmap aimed at addressing these concerns. The roadmap emphasizes the importance of ensuring safe-money settlement, establishing legal certainty, enhancing interoperability, implementing consistent regulation, and developing central bank liquidity tools to support 24/7 markets.

This initiative reflects the IMF's proactive approach to managing the evolving landscape of tokenized finance and its potential implications for the stability of the global financial system.

data.title: Anta Digital Technology Begins Internal Testing of DTClaw
data.description: Anta Digital Technology has initiated internal testing for its new product, DTClaw, which is designed to significantly reduce token consumption by up to 50%. According to NS3.AI, DTClaw is equipped with over 100 professional skills and seamlessly integrates with various enterprise systems, including office, finance, sales, and marketing.

data.title: Crude oil prices hit a new all-time high, and Gate's multi-asset trading strategy remains among the industry leaders.
data.description: On April 3, the United States and Israel launched strikes against Iranian infrastructure, triggering market concerns about disruptions to energy supplies in the Middle East. As a result, international oil prices surged, with WTI crude oil rising nearly 15% intraday, and the settlement price breaking through $110 for the first time since 2022; spot Brent crude oil prices also broke through the $140 mark, reaching a new high since 2008. According to CoinGlass data, activity in oil-related derivatives increased significantly, with XTI contract trading volume increasing by approximately 79.24% to $28.73 million and open interest rising by approximately 4.37% to $20.76 million. Specifically, Gate.com ranked first globally in XTI contract trading volume (approximately $21.24 million) and number of trades (approximately 74,500), and second globally in XTI contract open interest ($9.1 million). Gate Contracts has taken the lead in crude oil, pioneering the commodity contract sector, covering XBRUSDT (Brent crude oil) and WTIUSDT (WTI crude oil) perpetual contract trading, providing 24/7 trading, USDT settlement and up to 100x leverage, helping users to conduct cross-market asset allocation and strategy deployment in volatile market conditions.

data.title: Thailand's Ministry of Commerce: Inflation Pressure Remains Under Control
data.description: According to Jin10, Thailand's Ministry of Commerce has stated that the current inflation pressure in the country is under control. The ministry's assessment comes amid global economic uncertainties and fluctuating market conditions. The government continues to monitor the situation closely to ensure economic stability and maintain consumer confidence. Efforts are being made to address any potential challenges that may arise in the future.

data.title: The Ethereum Foundation has staked another $46.64 million worth of ETH, bringing the total staked amount to $96.59 million.
data.description: According to Arkham, the Ethereum Foundation has staked another $46.64 million worth of ETH, bringing the total staked amount to $96.59 million.

data.title: MEXC has fully integrated the USD1 stablecoin and launched Launchpool, wealth management, and zero-fee trading.
data.description: MEXC announced the full integration of the USD1 stablecoin into its platform product system and launched a series of activities. The first phase of the USD1 Launchpool officially launched on April 3rd at 18:00 (UTC+8), allowing users to stake USD1 and share a prize pool of 1,500,000 WLFI. Subsequent activities include: USD1 wealth management products, WLFI rewards for holding USD1, zero transaction fees for USD1 trading pairs, exclusive benefits for new users, and a lucky draw. The activities will continue until May 3rd, 2026, with a total prize pool reaching a maximum of 15 million WLFI.

data.title: Bitcoin's Position Index Declines, Indicating Increased Short Positions
data.description: CryptoQuant analyst Axel Adler Jr. reported a decline in Bitcoin's 30-day moving average Position Index to -3.1, down from a local high of +3.0 on March 17. According to NS3.AI, this shift suggests a rise in short positions within derivatives markets. Adler also noted that the Liquidation Oscillator increased to 18.6%, reflecting ongoing forced liquidations on the long side and challenging conditions for a sustained market recovery.

data.title: Turkey's Central Bank Conducts Gold-for-Lira Swap Auction
data.description: Turkey's central bank has initiated a traditional week-long gold-for-lira swap auction, according to Jin10. The auction involves a total of 8 tons of gold being exchanged for Turkish lira. This move is part of the central bank's ongoing efforts to manage its currency reserves and stabilize the national currency. The auction is expected to attract significant attention from market participants, given the current economic conditions in Turkey.

data.title: Ant Financial: DTClaw, a professional lobster product, officially launches internal testing.
data.description: Ant Financial announced that its professional AI assistant product, DTClaw, has entered internal testing. Unlike the "ordinary AI assistants" currently on the market that can only perform tasks such as document organization, meeting minutes, and data collection, DTClaw is positioned as a "professional AI assistant," providing 24/7 online dedicated AI agent services for professionals such as financial experts, marketing experts, and data experts. DTClaw supports hundreds of professional skills, covering high-value scenarios such as wealth management, investment, data analysis, R&D, and testing, and deeply integrates with enterprise office, finance, sales, and marketing systems to automate workflows. Users can deploy it with one click, eliminating the need to start from scratch and saving 50% on token consumption. (Jinshi)

data.title: Binance Wallet will launch the Sentio Pre-TGE event on April 7th.
data.description: Binance Wallet will be hosting the Sentio Pre-TGE event from 16:00 to 18:00 on April 7th. Binance users with sufficient Binance Alpha Points can participate by clicking the Pre-TGE event banner in their Binance Wallet. Participation will cost 15 points. Furthermore, tokens obtained from the pre-sale token exchange event are subject to a lock-up period set by the project team. Before unlocking, the tokens cannot be traded, transferred, or used. The project team may not announce the unlocking time in advance. Please be sure to understand the associated risks before participating.

data.title: Analysts: The Bitcoin derivatives market is dominated by short sellers, with long positions facing continuous liquidation pressure.
data.description: CryptoQuant analyst Axel Adler Jr. wrote, "The Bitcoin Position Index is a comprehensive indicator measuring the aggressiveness of long/short positions in the derivatives market, reflecting the current actual opening direction of positions by futures market participants. The index's 30-day Simple Moving Average (SMA-30d) reached a local high of +3.0 on March 17th when Bitcoin's price was $73,925, and has since continued to decline, falling to -3.1 today. This reflects the continued accumulation of short positions. During the same period, Bitcoin's price fell from $74,883 to $66,603, and the SMA-30d declined in tandem with the market price, further confirming the weakening market structure. The liquidation oscillator has rebounded from 2.9% since mid-March and has continued to rise, reaching 18.6% as of today. This means that the market is experiencing continuous forced liquidation on the long side, preventing structural recovery. The red bars reflecting short liquidation dominance have not appeared since October 2025. Only 30..." The 30-day moving average (DMA) remains high, and the prominent red histogram has not returned, indicating continued pressure from long positions. A downward reversal of the 30-day DMA would be the first signal that liquidation equilibrium is beginning to recover. The reversals of these two indicators occur simultaneously and corroborate each other. Bitcoin's price has fallen approximately 11% from its peak of $74,883, and the current derivatives market structure offers no basis for a sustained reversal: short sellers dominate, long positions are being continuously liquidated, and short squeezes are virtually nonexistent. Current trading stance: risk aversion. The main downside risk lies in: if liquidation pressure persists and the open SMA-30d remains below the zero line, the bearish pattern will solidify further, and the downward pressure on Bitcoin's price to fall below $66,000 will intensify.

data.title: Meme Coin Market Faces Liquidity Challenges Amid Competitive Landscape
data.description: The meme coin market is experiencing a decline in liquidity and increased competition, according to NS3.AI. Jerry, a trader, reported earning over $110,000 in March through rapid trading strategies. The article highlights that fewer than a hundred tokens are successfully launched each day, indicating a challenging environment for new entrants. Da Bai, another trader, has transitioned from long-term holding to short-term peer-to-peer trading following persistent losses.

data.title: Solana's SOL Surpasses 80 USDT Mark
data.description: Solana's cryptocurrency, SOL, has surpassed the 80 USDT threshold, according to Odaily. The current trading price is 80.01 USDT, reflecting a 24-hour increase of 0.68%.

data.title: Bitcoin(BTC) Surpasses 67,000 USDT with a 0.44% Increase in 24 Hours
data.description: On Apr 03, 2026, 07:34 AM(UTC). According to Binance Market Data, Bitcoin has crossed the 67,000 USDT benchmark and is now trading at 67,061.226563 USDT, with a narrowed 0.44% increase in 24 hours.

data.title: US Households' Equity Holdings Reach Record Levels
data.description: US households currently have 25.63% of their total net worth invested in equities, surpassing the previous high during the Dot-Com Bubble of 19.56% and the 1968 peak of 22.01%. According to NS3.AI, this significant exposure to equities raises concerns about potential economic impacts. Goldman Sachs has indicated that a sustained 10% decline in stock values through the second quarter could reduce GDP growth by 0.5 percentage points.

data.title: Bitcoin Price Constrained by Whale Orders, Says CoinGlass
data.description:
On April 3, CoinGlass reported that Bitcoin's price is currently confined within a specific range due to whale order book data. According to BlockBeats, sell orders are concentrated between $67,500 and the $67,950 to $68,050 range, while buy orders are positioned between $65,600 and $65,800, with strong support near $64,900.

The market is experiencing fluctuations rather than a trend. If the sell wall is absorbed, the outlook may become bullish; conversely, if the buy orders are withdrawn or consumed, the sentiment could turn bearish. Until then, the price remains compressed within the range set by the whales.

data.title: Turkey's Inflation Rate Rises 30.87% in March, Slightly Below Expectations
data.description: Turkey's consumer prices increased by 30.87% year-on-year in March, according to Jin10. This figure is slightly below market expectations, which anticipated a rise of 31.40%. The inflation rate reflects ongoing economic challenges in the country, as policymakers continue to address the impacts of rising costs on the economy.

data.title: Türkiye sold $20 billion worth of gold in three weeks to support its lira.
data.description: Türkiye has sold approximately 120 tons of gold, worth $20 billion, in three weeks to support its lira, including about 70 tons last week. (Solid Intel)

data.title: South Korea Orders Dunamu to Amend Disclosure on Stock Swap with Naver Financial
data.description: South Korea's Financial Supervisory Service has instructed Dunamu to revise its public disclosure regarding a comprehensive stock swap and transfer with Naver Financial. According to NS3.AI, the regulator highlighted that Dunamu's report contained significant omissions or false statements concerning future corporate restructuring plans and other matters crucial to investment decisions. In November, Dunamu announced that the plan would result in it becoming a wholly owned subsidiary of Naver Financial, with current shareholders receiving shares in Naver Financial.

data.title: CZ's new book, *Freedom of Money*, has become the number one bestseller in the crypto category on Amazon.
data.description: Amazon's website shows that CZ's new book, *Freedom of Money*, has become the number one bestseller in the crypto category. The book is priced at $9.99, and readers who pre-order will receive the digital version on April 8th. Previously, CZ stated that all proceeds from the book's sales will be donated to charity.
